sales.description:
SICILY. Syracuse. Agathokles, 317-289 B.C. AR Tetradrachm (16.99 gms), ca. 317-310 B.C. NGC Ch EF, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 5/5. Fine Style.
HGC-2, 1348; BAR Issue-2. Obverse: Wreathed head of Arethousa left; three dolphins around; monogram below neck; Reverse: Charioteer driving quadriga left; triskeles above, monogram in exergue. A beautiful, well-centered striking in fine Syracusan style. Rich gray cabinet tone with underlying luster throughout. With just a touch of wear on the high points, thi...
